rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §13.284, which governs conditions for incentive aid payments based on geographical boundary submissions for district consolidation.
quote:
To receive incentive aid payments:
(1) the geographical boundaries of the proposed district must be submitted to the agency for approval; and
(2) the geographical boundaries approved by the agency must be set forth in the petition for a consolidation election, if applicable.
_note: No relationship between the proposed change and this rule; no conflict detected.
